mapper.select: /* UserSavingMapper.selectSavingTotalCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_SAVING_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

/* UserSavingMapper.selectSavingDtl */ SELECT SI_SEQ AS siSeq ,SI_SJ AS siSj ,FORMAT(SI_TOTAL_AMOUNT, 0) AS siTotalAmount ,FORMAT(MONTHLY_PAYMENT_AMOUNT, 0) AS monthlyPaymentAmount ,TRAN_DAY AS tranDay ,BEGIN_DE AS beginDe ,END_DE AS endDe ,PAY_CNT AS payCnt ,REG_DT AS regDt FROM TB_SAVING_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND SI_SEQ = #{siSeq}
/* UserSavingMapper.selectSavingSeq */ SELECT IFNULL(MAX(SI_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_SAVING_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId}

/* UserSavingMapper.selectSchedulerSavingList */ SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId ,SI_SEQ AS siSeq ,SI_SJ AS siSj ,SI_TOTAL_AMOUNT AS siTotalAmount ,MONTHLY_PAYMENT_AMOUNT AS monthlyPaymentAmount ,TRAN_DAY AS tranDay ,BEGIN_DE AS beginDe ,END_DE AS endDe ,PAY_CNT AS payCnt ,REG_DT AS regDt FROM TB_SAVING_INFO WHERE DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN BEGIN_DE AND END_DE AND TRAN_DAY = #{value} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
